icepunch.name: Ice Punch
icepunch.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of freezing the target.

swordsdance.name: Swords Dance
swordsdance.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Attack stat by 2 stages.

bodyslam.name: Body Slam
bodyslam.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing the target. If the target has the Minimized status, this move’s power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.

doubleedge.name: Double-Edge
doubleedge.shortDesc: The user takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.

icebeam.name: Ice Beam
icebeam.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of freezing the target.

blizzard.name: Blizzard
blizzard.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of freezing targets. This move never misses in snow.

hyperbeam.name: Hyper Beam
hyperbeam.shortDesc: The user gains the Recharging status on the turn after this move is used.

lowkick.name: Low Kick
lowkick.shortDesc: The heavier the target, the greater this move’s power (ranging between 20 and 120).

leechseed.name: Leech Seed
leechseed.shortDesc: Gives the target the Leech Seeded status.

growth.name: Growth
growth.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage. In harsh sunlight, these stats will be boosted by 2 stages instead.

solarbeam.name: Solar Beam
solarbeam.shortDesc: The user gains the Charging status on the turn this move is used, then attacks on the following turn. In harsh sunlight, the user does not gain the Charging status and can attack immediately. This move’s power is halved in any other weather condition.

earthquake.name: Earthquake
earthquake.shortDesc: This move’s power is doubled against targets that have the Underground status. When Grassy Terrain is active, this move’s power is halved.

rest.name: Rest
rest.shortDesc: Fully restores the user’s HP and cures any status conditions. The user falls asleep for 2 turns. This move fails if the user’s HP is full.

rockslide.name: Rock Slide
rockslide.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of making targets flinch.

substitute.name: Substitute
substitute.shortDesc: The user loses 1/4 of its max HP to create a substitute. The substitute will be hit by moves instead of the user, and it will vanish when it takes damage equal to 1/4 of the user’s max HP.

snore.name: Snore
snore.shortDesc: Can be used only if the user is asleep. Has a 30% chance of making the target flinch.

curse.name: Curse
curse.shortDesc: The user loses 1/2 of its max HP to give the target the Cursed status.

protect.name: Protect
protect.shortDesc: The user protects itself from incoming moves for the turn. With each consecutive use, this move’s chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.

scaryface.name: Scary Face
scaryface.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Speed stat by 2 stages.

mudslap.name: Mud-Slap
mudslap.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s accuracy by 1 stage.

icywind.name: Icy Wind
icywind.shortDesc: Lowers targets’ Speed stats by 1 stage.

outrage.name: Outrage
outrage.shortDesc: The user gains the Rampaging status.

gigadrain.name: Giga Drain
gigadrain.shortDesc: The user’s HP is restored by 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

endure.name: Endure
endure.shortDesc: During the turn this move is used, if the user takes damage from a move that would knock it out, it will endure the hit with 1 HP. With each consecutive use, this move’s chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.

swagger.name: Swagger
swagger.shortDesc: Boosts the target’s Attack stat by 2 stages and confuses it.

sleeptalk.name: Sleep Talk
sleeptalk.shortDesc: Can be used only if the user is asleep. The user uses one of the other moves it knows at random.

irontail.name: Iron Tail
irontail.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of lowering the target’s Defense stat by 1 stage.

shadowball.name: Shadow Ball
shadowball.shortDesc: Has a 20% chance of lowering the target’s Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

facade.name: Facade
facade.shortDesc: This move’s power is doubled if the user is poisoned, badly poisoned, burned, or paralyzed. Although this move is a physical move, the damage it deals is not halved when the user is burned.

focuspunch.name: Focus Punch
focuspunch.shortDesc: This move fails if the user has already taken damage from a move in the same turn.

helpinghand.name: Helping Hand
helpinghand.shortDesc: Boosts the power of an ally’s move by 50% during the turn this move is used.

ingrain.name: Ingrain
ingrain.shortDesc: The user gains the Ingrained status.

brickbreak.name: Brick Break
brickbreak.shortDesc: Removes the Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil statuses on the target’s side.

weatherball.name: Weather Ball
weatherball.shortDesc: When a weather condition is present, this move’s power is doubled and its type changes. Harsh sunlight: Fire type. Rain: Water type. Snow: Ice type. Sandstorm: Rock type.

rocktomb.name: Rock Tomb
rocktomb.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Speed stat by 1 stage.

sheercold.name: Sheer Cold
sheercold.shortDesc: Knocks out the target. This move does not affect Ice types. The accuracy of this move is fixed at 30%. If used by Pokémon other than Ice types, the accuracy of this move is 20%.

bulletseed.name: Bullet Seed
bulletseed.shortDesc: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.

iciclespear.name: Icicle Spear
iciclespear.shortDesc: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.

magicalleaf.name: Magical Leaf
magicalleaf.shortDesc: This move does not check accuracy.

waterpulse.name: Water Pulse
waterpulse.shortDesc: Has a 20% chance of confusing the target.

fling.name: Fling
fling.shortDesc: This move’s power and effects depend on the user’s held item. The held item is lost after this move is used.

focusblast.name: Focus Blast
focusblast.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target’s Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

energyball.name: Energy Ball
energyball.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target’s Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

earthpower.name: Earth Power
earthpower.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target’s Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

gigaimpact.name: Giga Impact
gigaimpact.shortDesc: The user gains the Recharging status on the turn after this move is used.

avalanche.name: Avalanche
avalanche.shortDesc: This move’s power is doubled if the target has already dealt damage to the user with a move in the same turn.

leafstorm.name: Leaf Storm
leafstorm.shortDesc: Lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat by 2 stages.

grassknot.name: Grass Knot
grassknot.shortDesc: The heavier the target, the greater this move’s power (ranging between 20 and 120).

woodhammer.name: Wood Hammer
woodhammer.shortDesc: The user takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.

round.name: Round
round.shortDesc: If multiple Pokémon use this move in the same turn, the second user onward will act immediately after the first, and the power of the second Round onward will be doubled.

bulldoze.name: Bulldoze
bulldoze.shortDesc: Lowers targets’ Speed stats by 1 stage. When Grassy Terrain is active, this move’s power is halved.

icehammer.name: Ice Hammer
icehammer.shortDesc: Lowers the user’s Speed stat by 1 stage.

auroraveil.name: Aurora Veil
auroraveil.shortDesc: Gives the user’s side the Aurora Veil status for 5 turns. This move can be used only in snow.

stompingtantrum.name: Stomping Tantrum
stompingtantrum.shortDesc: This move’s power is doubled if the user couldn’t act or its move missed or failed on the previous turn.

bodypress.name: Body Press
bodypress.shortDesc: The damage dealt by this move is calculated using the user’s Defense stat instead of its Attack stat.

grassyglide.name: Grassy Glide
grassyglide.shortDesc: If the user is under the effect of Grassy Terrain, this move’s priority becomes +1.

trailblaze.name: Trailblaze
trailblaze.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Speed stat by 1 stage.

chillingwater.name: Chilling Water
chillingwater.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Attack stat by 1 stage.

hardpress.name: Hard Press
hardpress.shortDesc: The more HP the target has left, the greater this move’s power (ranging between 1 and 100).

bite.name: Bite
bite.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of making the target flinch.

flamethrower.name: Flamethrower
flamethrower.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of burning the target.

thunderbolt.name: Thunderbolt
thunderbolt.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of paralyzing the target.

thunder.name: Thunder
thunder.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing the target. This move never misses in rain and can hit a target that has the Sky-High status.

doubleteam.name: Double Team
doubleteam.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s evasiveness by 1 stage.

focusenergy.name: Focus Energy
focusenergy.shortDesc: The user gains a 2-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

fireblast.name: Fire Blast
fireblast.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of burning the target.

swift.name: Swift
swift.shortDesc: This move does not check accuracy. Hits foes.

thief.name: Thief
thief.shortDesc: If the user is not already holding an item, it steals the target’s held item.

perishsong.name: Perish Song
perishsong.shortDesc: Gives all Pokémon on the field the Perishing status.

detect.name: Detect
detect.shortDesc: The user protects itself from incoming moves for the turn. With each consecutive use, this move’s chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.

meanlook.name: Mean Look
meanlook.shortDesc: Gives the target the Can’t Escape status.

attract.name: Attract
attract.shortDesc: Gives the target the Infatuated status. This move will fail against a target that is the same gender as the user or whose gender is unknown.

batonpass.name: Baton Pass
batonpass.shortDesc: The user switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon. If the user had any stat changes, a substitute, or other such effects, they will be passed on to the Pokémon switching in.

futuresight.name: Future Sight
futuresight.shortDesc: Gives the target’s spot the Future Attack status.

taunt.name: Taunt
taunt.shortDesc: Gives the target the Taunted status.

superpower.name: Superpower
superpower.shortDesc: Lowers the user’s Attack and Defense stats by 1 stage.

knockoff.name: Knock Off
knockoff.shortDesc: This move’s power is boosted by 50% if the target is holding an item. Causes the target to lose its held item.

bounce.name: Bounce
bounce.shortDesc: The user gains the Sky-High status on the turn this move is used, then attacks on the following turn. This move has a 30% chance of paralyzing the target.

calmmind.name: Calm Mind
calmmind.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage.

feint.name: Feint
feint.shortDesc: This move can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect and removes the effects of those moves.

closecombat.name: Close Combat
closecombat.shortDesc: Lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage.

payback.name: Payback
payback.shortDesc: This move’s power is doubled if the user attacks after the target.

assurance.name: Assurance
assurance.shortDesc: This move’s power is doubled if the target has already taken damage during the turn this move is used.

suckerpunch.name: Sucker Punch
suckerpunch.shortDesc: This move fails unless the target has chosen an attack and has not yet attacked during the turn this move is used.

darkpulse.name: Dark Pulse
darkpulse.shortDesc: Has a 20% chance of making the target flinch.

nightslash.name: Night Slash
nightslash.shortDesc: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

airslash.name: Air Slash
airslash.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of making the target flinch.

shadowclaw.name: Shadow Claw
shadowclaw.shortDesc: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

psychocut.name: Psycho Cut
psychocut.shortDesc: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

zenheadbutt.name: Zen Headbutt
zenheadbutt.shortDesc: Has a 20% chance of making the target flinch.

stoneedge.name: Stone Edge
stoneedge.shortDesc: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

foulplay.name: Foul Play
foulplay.shortDesc: The damage dealt by this move is calculated using the target’s Attack stat instead of the user’s Attack stat.

hex.name: Hex
hex.shortDesc: This move’s power is doubled if the target has a status condition.

retaliate.name: Retaliate
retaliate.shortDesc: Power doubles if an ally fainted last turn.

snarl.name: Snarl
snarl.shortDesc: Lowers targets’ Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage.

phantomforce.name: Phantom Force
phantomforce.shortDesc: The user gains the Concealed status on the turn this move is used, then attacks on the following turn. This move can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect and removes the effects of those moves.

playrough.name: Play Rough
playrough.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target’s Attack stat by 1 stage.

throatchop.name: Throat Chop
throatchop.shortDesc: Gives the target the Throat Chopped status.

brutalswing.name: Brutal Swing
brutalswing.shortDesc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent Pokemon.

screech.name: Screech
screech.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Defense stat by 2 stages.

reflect.name: Reflect
reflect.shortDesc: Gives the user’s side the Reflect status for 5 turns.

reversal.name: Reversal
reversal.shortDesc: The less HP the user has left, the greater this move’s power (ranging between 20 and 200).

destinybond.name: Destiny Bond
destinybond.shortDesc: The user gains the Destiny Bound status. This move fails if used in succession.

metalsound.name: Metal Sound
metalsound.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Sp. Def stat by 2 stages.

irondefense.name: Iron Defense
irondefense.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Defense stat by 2 stages.

block.name: Block
block.shortDesc: Gives the target the Can’t Escape status.

gyroball.name: Gyro Ball
gyroball.shortDesc: The lower the user’s Speed stat compared to the target’s, the greater this move’s power (ranging between 1 and 150).

powertrick.name: Power Trick
powertrick.shortDesc: The user gains the Atk/Def Swapped status.

flashcannon.name: Flash Cannon
flashcannon.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target’s Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

ironhead.name: Iron Head
ironhead.shortDesc: Has a 20% chance of making the target flinch.

headsmash.name: Head Smash
headsmash.shortDesc: The user takes 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

doublehit.name: Double Hit
doublehit.shortDesc: The user attacks twice in a row.

wideguard.name: Wide Guard
wideguard.shortDesc: During the turn this move is used, the user protects its side from moves that target all allies.

autotomize.name: Autotomize
autotomize.shortDesc: Raises the user's Speed by 2; user loses 100 kg.

sacredsword.name: Sacred Sword
sacredsword.shortDesc: This move ignores the target’s stat changes when dealing damage.

kingsshield.name: King’s Shield
kingsshield.shortDesc: The user protects itself from incoming attacks for the turn and changes into its Shield Forme. Any attackers that use contact moves against the user during this turn will have their Attack stats lowered by 1 stage. With each consecutive use, this move’s chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.

solarblade.name: Solar Blade
solarblade.shortDesc: The user gains the Charging status on the turn this move is used, then attacks on the following turn. In harsh sunlight, the user does not gain the Charging status and can attack immediately. This move’s power is halved in any other weather condition.

steelbeam.name: Steel Beam
steelbeam.shortDesc: After attacking, the user takes damage equal to 1/2 of its max HP.

poltergeist.name: Poltergeist
poltergeist.shortDesc: This move fails if the target isn’t holding an item.

whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
whirlwind.shortDesc: If there are other Pokémon in the target’s party that can switch into battle, the target is forced to switch out of battle and is replaced by one of those Pokémon at random.

fly.name: Fly
fly.shortDesc: The user gains the Sky-High status on the turn this move is used, then attacks on the following turn.

roar.name: Roar
roar.shortDesc: If there are other Pokémon in the target’s party that can switch into battle, the target is forced to switch out of battle and is replaced by one of those Pokémon at random.

agility.name: Agility
agility.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Speed stat by 2 stages.

skyattack.name: Sky Attack
skyattack.shortDesc: The user gains the Charging status on the turn this move is used, then attacks on the following turn. This move has a 30% chance of making the target flinch, and it has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

steelwing.name: Steel Wing
steelwing.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of boosting the user’s Defense stat by 1 stage.

crunch.name: Crunch
crunch.shortDesc: Has a 20% chance of lowering the target’s Defense stat by 1 stage.

ancientpower.name: Ancient Power
ancientpower.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of boosting the user’s Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats by 1 stage.

heatwave.name: Heat Wave
heatwave.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of burning targets.

dragondance.name: Dragon Dance
dragondance.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Attack and Speed stats by 1 stage.

rockblast.name: Rock Blast
rockblast.shortDesc: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.

roost.name: Roost
roost.shortDesc: Restores 1/2 of the user’s max HP. If the user is a Flying type, it will lose the Flying type for the turn.

tailwind.name: Tailwind
tailwind.shortDesc: Gives the user’s side the Tailwind status for 4 turns.

thunderfang.name: Thunder Fang
thunderfang.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of paralyzing the target and a 10% chance of making the target flinch.

icefang.name: Ice Fang
icefang.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of freezing the target and a 10% chance of making the target flinch.

firefang.name: Fire Fang
firefang.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of burning the target and a 10% chance of making the target flinch.

stealthrock.name: Stealth Rock
stealthrock.shortDesc: Gives the opponent’s side the Stealth Rock status.

hurricane.name: Hurricane
hurricane.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of confusing the target. This move never misses in rain and can hit a target that has the Sky-High status.

psychicfangs.name: Psychic Fangs
psychicfangs.shortDesc: Removes the Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil statuses on the target’s side.

meteorbeam.name: Meteor Beam
meteorbeam.shortDesc: The user gains the Charging status on the turn this move is used, then attacks on the following turn. The user’s Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 1 stage on the turn this move is used.

dualwingbeat.name: Dual Wingbeat
dualwingbeat.shortDesc: The user attacks twice in a row.

firepunch.name: Fire Punch
firepunch.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of burning the target.

thunderpunch.name: Thunder Punch
thunderpunch.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of paralyzing the target.

surf.name: Surf
surf.shortDesc: This move’s power is doubled against targets that have the Submerged status.

dig.name: Dig
dig.shortDesc: The user gains the Underground status on the turn this move is used, then attacks on the following turn.

metalclaw.name: Metal Claw
metalclaw.shortDesc: 10% chance to raise the user's Attack by 1.

whirlpool.name: Whirlpool
whirlpool.shortDesc: Gives the target the Bound status. This move’s power is doubled if the target has the Submerged status.

uproar.name: Uproar
uproar.shortDesc: The user gains the Uproar status.

endeavor.name: Endeavor
endeavor.shortDesc: Deals damage to the target equal to its remaining HP minus the user’s remaining HP. This move fails if the target’s HP is the same as or lower than the user’s.

sandtomb.name: Sand Tomb
sandtomb.shortDesc: Gives the target the Bound status.

metalburst.name: Metal Burst
metalburst.shortDesc: The user retaliates to deal 150% of the damage it took from an opponent’s move during the turn this move is used.

dragonrush.name: Dragon Rush
dragonrush.shortDesc: Has a 20% chance of making the target flinch. If the target has the Minimized status, this move’s power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.

heavyslam.name: Heavy Slam
heavyslam.shortDesc: The more the user outweighs the target, the greater this move’s power (ranging between 40 and 120). If the target has the Minimized status, this move’s power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.

steelroller.name: Steel Roller
steelroller.shortDesc: Removes any terrain. This move fails if there is no terrain on the field.

disable.name: Disable
disable.shortDesc: Gives the target the Move Disabled status for 4 turns.

psychic.name: Psychic
psychic.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target’s Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

recover.name: Recover
recover.shortDesc: Restores 1/2 of the user’s max HP.

lightscreen.name: Light Screen
lightscreen.shortDesc: Gives the user’s side the Light Screen status for 5 turns.

triattack.name: Tri Attack
triattack.shortDesc: Has a 20% chance of leaving the target burned, frozen, or paralyzed.

safeguard.name: Safeguard
safeguard.shortDesc: Gives the user’s side the Safeguard status for 5 turns.

encore.name: Encore
encore.shortDesc: Gives the target the Encore status.

trick.name: Trick
trick.shortDesc: The user and the target swap their held items.

roleplay.name: Role Play
roleplay.shortDesc: Changes the user’s Ability to be the same as the target’s.

skillswap.name: Skill Swap
skillswap.shortDesc: The user and the target swap their Abilities.

imprison.name: Imprison
imprison.shortDesc: The user gains the Sealing Off status.

powerswap.name: Power Swap
powerswap.shortDesc: The user swaps the changes to its Attack and Sp. Atk stats with the changes to the target’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

guardswap.name: Guard Swap
guardswap.shortDesc: The user swaps the changes to its Defense and Sp. Def stats with the changes to the target’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.

drainpunch.name: Drain Punch
drainpunch.shortDesc: The user’s HP is restored by 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

nastyplot.name: Nasty Plot
nastyplot.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Sp. Atk stat by 2 stages.

trickroom.name: Trick Room
trickroom.shortDesc: Gives the entire field the Trick Room status for 5 turns.

guardsplit.name: Guard Split
guardsplit.shortDesc: The user adds its Defense stat to the target’s Defense stat, then splits the total in half for them to share. It does the same with each of their Sp. Def stats.

wonderroom.name: Wonder Room
wonderroom.shortDesc: Gives the entire field the Wonder Room status for 5 turns.

psyshock.name: Psyshock
psyshock.shortDesc: This is a special move, but the damage it deals is calculated using the target’s Defense stat.

magicroom.name: Magic Room
magicroom.shortDesc: Gives the entire field the Magic Room status for 5 turns.

storedpower.name: Stored Power
storedpower.shortDesc: This move’s power is increased by 20 for each stage that the user’s stats have been boosted.

allyswitch.name: Ally Switch
allyswitch.shortDesc: The user switches spots with one of its allies. With each consecutive use, this move’s chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.

dazzlinggleam.name: Dazzling Gleam
dazzlinggleam.shortDesc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent foes.

psychicterrain.name: Psychic Terrain
psychicterrain.shortDesc: Turns the entire field into Psychic Terrain for 5 turns.

speedswap.name: Speed Swap
speedswap.shortDesc: The user and the target swap their Speed stats.

expandingforce.name: Expanding Force
expandingforce.shortDesc: If the user is under the effect of Psychic Terrain, this move’s power is boosted by 50% and its range extends to all opponents.

acidarmor.name: Acid Armor
acidarmor.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Defense stat by 2 stages.

charm.name: Charm
charm.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Attack stat by 2 stages.

painsplit.name: Pain Split
painsplit.shortDesc: The user adds its remaining HP to the target’s remaining HP, then splits the total in half for them to share.

psychup.name: Psych Up
psychup.shortDesc: The user copies the target’s stat changes.

faketears.name: Fake Tears
faketears.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Sp. Def stat by 2 stages.

lastresort.name: Last Resort
lastresort.shortDesc: This move fails unless the user has already used all the other moves it knows.

entrainment.name: Entrainment
entrainment.shortDesc: Changes the target’s Ability to be the same as the user’s.

disarmingvoice.name: Disarming Voice
disarmingvoice.shortDesc: This move does not check accuracy. Hits foes.

drainingkiss.name: Draining Kiss
drainingkiss.shortDesc: The user’s HP is restored by 3/4 of the damage dealt by this move.

mistyterrain.name: Misty Terrain
mistyterrain.shortDesc: Turns the entire field into Misty Terrain for 5 turns.

mysticalfire.name: Mystical Fire
mysticalfire.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.

aromaticmist.name: Aromatic Mist
aromaticmist.shortDesc: Boosts an ally’s Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

babydolleyes.name: Baby-Doll Eyes
babydolleyes.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Attack stat by 1 stage.

decorate.name: Decorate
decorate.shortDesc: Boosts the target’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 2 stages.

mistyexplosion.name: Misty Explosion
mistyexplosion.shortDesc: If the user is under the effect of Misty Terrain, this move’s power is boosted by 50%. The user faints upon using this move.

alluringvoice.name: Alluring Voice
alluringvoice.shortDesc: Confuses the target if its stats were boosted during the turn this move is used.

firespin.name: Fire Spin
firespin.shortDesc: Gives the target the Bound status.

haze.name: Haze
haze.shortDesc: Eliminates every stat change on the entire field.

featherdance.name: Feather Dance
featherdance.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Attack stat by 2 stages.

hypervoice.name: Hyper Voice
hypervoice.shortDesc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent foes.

pluck.name: Pluck
pluck.shortDesc: If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats that Berry and gains its effect.

bravebird.name: Brave Bird
bravebird.shortDesc: The user takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.

defog.name: Defog

dracometeor.name: Draco Meteor
dracometeor.shortDesc: Lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat by 2 stages.

acrobatics.name: Acrobatics
acrobatics.shortDesc: This move’s power is doubled if the user isn’t holding an item.

cottonguard.name: Cotton Guard
cottonguard.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Defense stat by 3 stages.

moonblast.name: Moonblast
moonblast.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target’s Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.

breakingswipe.name: Breaking Swipe
breakingswipe.shortDesc: Lowers targets’ Attack stats by 1 stage.

dragoncheer.name: Dragon Cheer
dragoncheer.shortDesc: Gives allies a Critical-Hit Ratio Boost. Dragon types receive a 2-stage boost. All other types receive a 1-stage boost.

cottonspore.name: Cotton Spore
cottonspore.shortDesc: Lowers targets’ Speed stats by 2 stages.

flatter.name: Flatter
flatter.shortDesc: Boosts the target’s Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage and confuses it.

charge.name: Charge
charge.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Sp. Def stat by 1 stage. The user gains the Electric Boost status.

discharge.name: Discharge
discharge.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing targets.

chargebeam.name: Charge Beam
chargebeam.shortDesc: Has a 70% chance of boosting the user’s Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.

electroball.name: Electro Ball
electroball.shortDesc: The higher the user’s Speed stat compared to the target’s, the greater this move’s power (ranging between 40 and 150).

afteryou.name: After You
afteryou.shortDesc: Makes the target move immediately after the user.

voltswitch.name: Volt Switch
voltswitch.shortDesc: After attacking, the user switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon.

dragontail.name: Dragon Tail
dragontail.shortDesc: If there are other Pokémon in the target’s party that can switch into battle, the target is forced to switch out of battle and is replaced by one of those Pokémon at random.

electroweb.name: Electroweb
electroweb.shortDesc: Lowers targets’ Speed stats by 1 stage.

wildcharge.name: Wild Charge
wildcharge.shortDesc: The user takes 1/4 of the damage dealt by this move.

paraboliccharge.name: Parabolic Charge
paraboliccharge.shortDesc: The user’s HP is restored by 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

eerieimpulse.name: Eerie Impulse
eerieimpulse.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat by 2 stages.

magneticflux.name: Magnetic Flux
magneticflux.shortDesc: If the user or its allies have the Plus Ability or the Minus Ability, their Defense and Sp. Def stats are boosted by 1 stage.

electricterrain.name: Electric Terrain
electricterrain.shortDesc: Turns the entire field into Electric Terrain for 5 turns.

risingvoltage.name: Rising Voltage
risingvoltage.shortDesc: This move’s power is doubled if the target is under the effect of Electric Terrain.

supercellslam.name: Supercell Slam
supercellslam.shortDesc: If this move misses or fails, the user takes damage equal to 1/2 of its max HP. If the target has the Minimized status, this move’s power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.

thrash.name: Thrash
thrash.shortDesc: The user gains the Rampaging status.

counter.name: Counter
counter.shortDesc: The user retaliates to deal double the damage it took from an opponent’s physical move during the turn this move is used.

spite.name: Spite
spite.shortDesc: Removes 4 PP from the move last used by the target.

crosschop.name: Cross Chop
crosschop.shortDesc: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

beatup.name: Beat Up
beatup.shortDesc: The target is attacked as many times as the number of Pokémon in the user’s party. Pokémon that have fainted or have a status condition are not counted. This move’s power is calculated based on the Attack stats of the party Pokémon.

torment.name: Torment
torment.shortDesc: Gives the target the Unable to Repeat status.

overheat.name: Overheat
overheat.shortDesc: Lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat by 2 stages.

bulkup.name: Bulk Up
bulkup.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Attack and Defense stats by 1 stage.

uturn.name: U-turn
uturn.shortDesc: After attacking, the user switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon.

poisonjab.name: Poison Jab
poisonjab.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of poisoning the target.

gunkshot.name: Gunk Shot
gunkshot.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of poisoning the target.

smackdown.name: Smack Down
smackdown.shortDesc: If the target is off the ground, it gains the Landed status. This move can hit a target that has the Sky-High status.

lowsweep.name: Low Sweep
lowsweep.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Speed stat by 1 stage.

lashout.name: Lash Out
lashout.shortDesc: This move’s power is doubled if the user’s stats were lowered during the turn this move is used.

coaching.name: Coaching
coaching.shortDesc: Boosts allies’ Attack and Defense stats by 1 stage.

ragefist.name: Rage Fist
ragefist.shortDesc: This move’s power is increased by 50 each time the user takes damage from a move, up to a maximum power of 350. If the user switches out of battle, the move’s power returns to its usual value.

amnesia.name: Amnesia
amnesia.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Sp. Def stat by 2 stages.

recycle.name: Recycle
recycle.shortDesc: Regenerates the last held item that the user consumed. The user then holds this item once more.

grassyterrain.name: Grassy Terrain
grassyterrain.shortDesc: Turns the entire field into Grassy Terrain for 5 turns.

appleacid.name: Apple Acid
appleacid.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

pounce.name: Pounce
pounce.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Speed stat by 1 stage.

bubblebeam.name: Bubble Beam
bubblebeam.shortDesc: 10% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.

waterfall.name: Waterfall
waterfall.shortDesc: Has a 20% chance of making the target flinch.

leechlife.name: Leech Life
leechlife.shortDesc: The user’s HP is restored by 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

mirrorcoat.name: Mirror Coat
mirrorcoat.shortDesc: The user retaliates to deal double the damage it took from an opponent’s special move during the turn this move is used.

stockpile.name: Stockpile
stockpile.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage. Raises the user’s Stockpiling level by 1. Can be used up to 3 times.

spitup.name: Spit Up
spitup.shortDesc: The higher the user’s Stockpiling level, the greater this move’s power (ranging between 100 and 300). This move fails unless the user has the Stockpiling status.

dive.name: Dive
dive.shortDesc: The user gains the Submerged status on the turn this move is used, then attacks on the following turn.

aquaring.name: Aqua Ring
aquaring.shortDesc: The user gains the Aqua Ring status.

bugbuzz.name: Bug Buzz
bugbuzz.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target’s Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

bugbite.name: Bug Bite
bugbite.shortDesc: If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats that Berry and gains its effect.

powersplit.name: Power Split
powersplit.shortDesc: The user adds its Attack stat to the target’s Attack stat, then splits the total in half for them to share. It does the same with each of their Sp. Atk stats.

soak.name: Soak
soak.shortDesc: Changes the target’s type to Water.

stickyweb.name: Sticky Web
stickyweb.shortDesc: Gives the opponent’s side the Sticky Web status.

infestation.name: Infestation
infestation.shortDesc: Gives the target the Bound status.

lunge.name: Lunge
lunge.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Attack stat by 1 stage.

liquidation.name: Liquidation
liquidation.shortDesc: Has a 20% chance of lowering the target’s Defense stat by 1 stage.

skittersmack.name: Skitter Smack
skittersmack.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.

wrap.name: Wrap
wrap.shortDesc: Gives the target the Bound status.

toxic.name: Toxic
toxic.shortDesc: Badly poisons the target. If the user is a Poison type, this move will never miss.

sludgebomb.name: Sludge Bomb
sludgebomb.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of poisoning the target.

swallow.name: Swallow
swallow.shortDesc: The higher the user’s Stockpiling level, the more HP the user restores. Level 1: 1/4 of the user’s max HP is restored. Level 2: 1/2 of the user’s max HP is restored. Level 3: The user’s HP is fully restored. This move fails unless the user has the Stockpiling status.

poisonfang.name: Poison Fang
poisonfang.shortDesc: Has a 50% chance of badly poisoning the target.

mudshot.name: Mud Shot
mudshot.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Speed stat by 1 stage.

gastroacid.name: Gastro Acid
gastroacid.shortDesc: Gives the target the No Ability status.

toxicspikes.name: Toxic Spikes
toxicspikes.shortDesc: Gives the opponent’s side the Toxic Spikes status.

switcheroo.name: Switcheroo
switcheroo.shortDesc: The user and the target swap their held items.

venoshock.name: Venoshock
venoshock.shortDesc: This move’s power is doubled if the target is poisoned or badly poisoned.

sludgewave.name: Sludge Wave
sludgewave.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of poisoning targets.

coil.name: Coil
coil.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Attack and Defense stats as well as its accuracy by 1 stage.

acidspray.name: Acid Spray
acidspray.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Sp. Def stat by 2 stages.

belch.name: Belch
belch.shortDesc: This move fails unless the user has eaten a Berry during the battle.

scaleshot.name: Scale Shot
scaleshot.shortDesc: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row. This move lowers the user’s Defense stat by 1 stage and boosts its Speed stat by 1 stage.

morningsun.name: Morning Sun
morningsun.shortDesc: Restores 1/2 of the user’s max HP. In harsh sunlight, 2/3 of its max HP will be restored instead. In all other weather conditions, 1/4 of its max HP will be restored instead.

howl.name: Howl
howl.shortDesc: Boosts the Attack stats of the user and its allies by 1 stage.

covet.name: Covet
covet.shortDesc: If the user is not already holding an item, it steals the target’s held item.

flareblitz.name: Flare Blitz
flareblitz.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of burning the target. Cures the user of being frozen. The user also takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.

flamecharge.name: Flame Charge
flamecharge.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Speed stat by 1 stage.

heatcrash.name: Heat Crash
heatcrash.shortDesc: The more the user outweighs the target, the greater this move’s power (ranging between 40 and 120). If the target has the Minimized status, this move’s power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.

burnup.name: Burn Up
burnup.shortDesc: The user loses the Fire type. Cures the user of being frozen. This move fails unless it is used by a Fire type.

scorchingsands.name: Scorching Sands
scorchingsands.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of burning the target. Cures the user and target of being frozen.

ragingfury.name: Raging Fury
ragingfury.shortDesc: The user gains the Rampaging status.

temperflare.name: Temper Flare
temperflare.shortDesc: This move’s power is doubled if the user couldn’t act or its move missed or failed on the previous turn.

electroshot.name: Electro Shot
electroshot.shortDesc: The user gains the Charging status on the turn this move is used, then attacks on the following turn. In rain, the user does not gain the Charging status and can attack immediately. The user’s Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 1 stage on the turn this move is used.

pinmissile.name: Pin Missile
pinmissile.shortDesc: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.

stringshot.name: String Shot
stringshot.shortDesc: Lowers targets’ Speed stats by 2 stages.

crosspoison.name: Cross Poison
crosspoison.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of poisoning the target. This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

ragepowder.name: Rage Powder
ragepowder.shortDesc: The user redirects opponents’ moves toward itself. This effect works only on single-target moves.

strugglebug.name: Struggle Bug
strugglebug.shortDesc: Lowers targets’ Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage.

fellstinger.name: Fell Stinger

firstimpression.name: First Impression
firstimpression.shortDesc: This move fails unless it is the first move used by the user after it enters a battle.

toxicthread.name: Toxic Thread
toxicthread.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Speed stat by 2 stages and poisons it.

lavaplume.name: Lava Plume
lavaplume.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of burning targets.

clearsmog.name: Clear Smog
clearsmog.shortDesc: Removes all stat changes from the target. This move never misses.

armorcannon.name: Armor Cannon
armorcannon.shortDesc: Lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage.

flail.name: Flail
flail.shortDesc: The less HP the user has left, the greater this move’s power (ranging between 20 and 200).

wish.name: Wish
wish.shortDesc: Gives the user’s spot the Wish status.

aromatherapy.name: Aromatherapy
aromatherapy.shortDesc: Cures the user's party of all status conditions.

healpulse.name: Heal Pulse
healpulse.shortDesc: Restores 1/2 of the target’s max HP.

yawn.name: Yawn
yawn.shortDesc: Makes the target drowsy. This move never misses.

healingwish.name: Healing Wish
healingwish.shortDesc: The user faints. The Pokémon taking its place will have its HP fully restored and its status conditions cured.

simplebeam.name: Simple Beam
simplebeam.shortDesc: Changes the target’s Ability to Simple.

lifedew.name: Life Dew
lifedew.shortDesc: Restores 1/4 of the max HP of the user and its allies.

freezedry.name: Freeze-Dry
freezedry.shortDesc: This move is also super effective against Water-type Pokémon.

rapidspin.name: Rapid Spin
rapidspin.shortDesc: Removes the Bound and Leech Seeded statuses from the user and removes the Sticky Web, Stealth Rock, Spikes, and Toxic Spikes statuses from the user’s side. Boosts the user’s Speed stat by 1 stage.

mountaingale.name: Mountain Gale
mountaingale.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of making the target flinch.

iciclecrash.name: Icicle Crash
iciclecrash.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of making the target flinch.

bellydrum.name: Belly Drum
bellydrum.shortDesc: The user loses 1/2 of its max HP to boost its Attack stat to its sixth stage. This move fails if the user doesn’t have enough remaining HP.

tickle.name: Tickle
tickle.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Attack and Defense stats by 1 stage.

muddywater.name: Muddy Water
muddywater.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of lowering targets’ accuracy by 1 stage.

copycat.name: Copycat
copycat.shortDesc: The user mimics the move that was last used. This move fails if no other move has been used yet.

burningjealousy.name: Burning Jealousy
burningjealousy.shortDesc: Burns targets if their stats were boosted during the turn this move is used.

rockpolish.name: Rock Polish
rockpolish.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Speed stat by 2 stages.

honeclaws.name: Hone Claws
honeclaws.shortDesc: Raises the user's Attack and accuracy by 1.

scald.name: Scald
scald.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of burning the target. Cures the user and target of being frozen.

shellsmash.name: Shell Smash
shellsmash.shortDesc: Lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage and boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats by 2 stages.

razorshell.name: Razor Shell
razorshell.shortDesc: Has a 50% chance of lowering the target’s Defense stat by 1 stage.

aquacutter.name: Aqua Cutter
aquacutter.shortDesc: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

flipturn.name: Flip Turn
flipturn.shortDesc: After attacking, the user switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon.

wavecrash.name: Wave Crash
wavecrash.shortDesc: The user takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.

lastrespects.name: Last Respects
lastrespects.shortDesc: This move’s power is increased by 50 for each time that a Pokémon in the user’s party has fainted.

fissure.name: Fissure
fissure.shortDesc: Knocks out the target. The accuracy of this move is fixed at 30%.

aircutter.name: Air Cutter
aircutter.shortDesc: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

drillrun.name: Drill Run
drillrun.shortDesc: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

pollenpuff.name: Pollen Puff
pollenpuff.shortDesc: When used on an ally, this move restores 1/2 of its max HP instead of dealing damage.

slackoff.name: Slack Off
slackoff.shortDesc: Restores 1/2 of the user’s max HP.

fakeout.name: Fake Out
fakeout.shortDesc: Makes the target flinch. This move fails unless it is the first move used by the user after it enters a battle.

hydrocannon.name: Hydro Cannon
hydrocannon.shortDesc: The user gains the Recharging status on the turn after this move is used.

waterspout.name: Water Spout
waterspout.shortDesc: The less HP the user has left, the lower this move’s power (ranging between 1 and 150).

terrainpulse.name: Terrain Pulse
terrainpulse.shortDesc: This move’s power is doubled if the user is under the effect of a terrain. This move’s type depends on the terrain.

highjumpkick.name: High Jump Kick
highjumpkick.shortDesc: If this move misses or fails, the user takes damage equal to 1/2 of its max HP.

blazekick.name: Blaze Kick
blazekick.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of burning the target. This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

crushclaw.name: Crush Claw
crushclaw.shortDesc: Has a 50% chance of lowering the target’s Defense stat by 1 stage.

blastburn.name: Blast Burn
blastburn.shortDesc: The user gains the Recharging status on the turn after this move is used.

upperhand.name: Upper Hand
upperhand.shortDesc: Makes the target flinch. This move fails if the target isn’t about to use a priority move.

selfdestruct.name: Self-Destruct
selfdestruct.shortDesc: The user faints upon using this move.

rollout.name: Rollout
rollout.shortDesc: Power doubles with each hit. Repeats for 5 turns.

eruption.name: Eruption
eruption.shortDesc: The less HP the user has left, the lower this move’s power (ranging between 1 and 150).

cosmicpower.name: Cosmic Power
cosmicpower.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage.

astonish.name: Astonish
astonish.shortDesc: 30% chance to make the target flinch.

quickguard.name: Quick Guard
quickguard.shortDesc: The user protects itself and its allies from priority moves for the turn.

bitterblade.name: Bitter Blade
bitterblade.shortDesc: The user’s HP is restored by 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

minimize.name: Minimize
minimize.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s evasiveness by 2 stages. The user gains the Minimized status.

memento.name: Memento
memento.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 2 stages. The user faints upon using this move.

superfang.name: Super Fang
superfang.shortDesc: Deals damage to the target equal to 1/2 of its remaining HP. Deals 1 HP of damage to a target that has only 1 HP left.

spikes.name: Spikes
spikes.shortDesc: Gives the opponent’s side the Spikes status.

synthesis.name: Synthesis
synthesis.shortDesc: Restores 1/2 of the user’s max HP. In harsh sunlight, 2/3 of its max HP will be restored instead. In all other weather conditions, 1/4 of its max HP will be restored instead.

frenzyplant.name: Frenzy Plant
frenzyplant.shortDesc: The user gains the Recharging status on the turn after this move is used.

hammerarm.name: Hammer Arm
hammerarm.shortDesc: Lowers the user’s Speed stat by 1 stage.

spikyshield.name: Spiky Shield
spikyshield.shortDesc: The user protects itself from incoming moves for the turn. Any attackers that use contact moves against the user during this turn take damage equal to 1/8 of their max HP. With each consecutive use, this move’s chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.

healbell.name: Heal Bell
healbell.shortDesc: The user cures the status conditions of all the Pokémon in its party, including itself, as well as its allies.

extrasensory.name: Extrasensory
extrasensory.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of making the target flinch.

gravity.name: Gravity
gravity.shortDesc: Gives the entire field the Gravity status for 5 turns.

boomburst.name: Boomburst
boomburst.shortDesc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent Pokemon.

psychicnoise.name: Psychic Noise
psychicnoise.shortDesc: Gives the target the Healing Prevented status for 2 turns.

crabhammer.name: Crabhammer
crabhammer.shortDesc: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

moonlight.name: Moonlight
moonlight.shortDesc: Restores 1/2 of the user’s max HP. In harsh sunlight, 2/3 of its max HP will be restored instead. In all other weather conditions, 1/4 of its max HP will be restored instead.

followme.name: Follow Me
followme.shortDesc: The user redirects opponents’ moves toward itself. This effect works only on single-target moves.

meteormash.name: Meteor Mash
meteormash.shortDesc: Has a 20% chance of boosting the user’s Attack stat by 1 stage.

revenge.name: Revenge
revenge.shortDesc: Power doubles if user is damaged by the target.

grudge.name: Grudge
grudge.shortDesc: If the user faints, the attack used loses all its PP.

craftyshield.name: Crafty Shield
craftyshield.shortDesc: Protects allies from Status moves this turn.

powertrip.name: Power Trip
powertrip.shortDesc: This move’s power is increased by 20 for each stage that the user’s stats have been boosted.

leafblade.name: Leaf Blade
leafblade.shortDesc: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

triplearrows.name: Triple Arrows
triplearrows.shortDesc: Has a 50% chance of lowering the target’s Defense stat by 1 stage and has a 30% chance of making the target flinch. This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

falseswipe.name: False Swipe
falseswipe.shortDesc: Always leaves the target with at least 1 HP.

spiritshackle.name: Spirit Shackle
spiritshackle.shortDesc: Gives the target the Can’t Escape status.

magnetrise.name: Magnet Rise
magnetrise.shortDesc: The user gains the Magnet Rise status.

tearfullook.name: Tearful Look
tearfullook.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage. This move ignores the target’s evasiveness and can hit a target using a move such as Protect.

laserfocus.name: Laser Focus
laserfocus.shortDesc: Until the end of the next turn, user's moves crit.

transform.name: Transform
transform.shortDesc: The user transforms into a copy of the target. It also copies all of the target’s stats apart from its HP.

poisontail.name: Poison Tail
poisontail.shortDesc: High critical hit ratio. 10% chance to poison.

lockon.name: Lock-On
lockon.shortDesc: The user gains the Locked On status.

dragondarts.name: Dragon Darts
dragondarts.shortDesc: The user attacks twice in a row. If there are 2 opposing Pokémon, each of them is attacked once.

tripleaxel.name: Triple Axel
tripleaxel.shortDesc: The user attacks 3 times in a row—first with a power of 20, then with a power of 40, then with a power of 60. The attack ends if the user misses.

luminacrash.name: Lumina Crash
luminacrash.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Sp. Def stat by 2 stages.

horndrill.name: Horn Drill
horndrill.shortDesc: Knocks out the target. The accuracy of this move is fixed at 30%.

noretreat.name: No Retreat
noretreat.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats by 1 stage. The user gains the Can’t Escape status. This move can only be used once per time the user enters battle— otherwise it will fail.

twinbeam.name: Twin Beam
twinbeam.shortDesc: The user attacks twice in a row.

gravapple.name: Grav Apple
gravapple.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Defense stat by 1 stage. This move’s power is boosted by 50% when the Gravity status is active.

petaldance.name: Petal Dance
petaldance.shortDesc: The user gains the Rampaging status.

petalblizzard.name: Petal Blizzard
petalblizzard.shortDesc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent Pokemon.

lightofruin.name: Light of Ruin
lightofruin.shortDesc: The user takes 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

explosion.name: Explosion
explosion.shortDesc: The user faints upon using this move.

venomdrench.name: Venom Drench
venomdrench.shortDesc: Lowers Atk/Sp. Atk/Speed of poisoned foes by 1.

corrosivegas.name: Corrosive Gas
corrosivegas.shortDesc: Causes all other Pokémon on the field to lose their held items.

twister.name: Twister
twister.shortDesc: 20% chance to make the foe(s) flinch.

dreameater.name: Dream Eater
dreameater.shortDesc: User gains 1/2 HP inflicted. Sleeping target only.

saltcure.name: Salt Cure
saltcure.shortDesc: Gives the target the Salt Cured status.

reflecttype.name: Reflect Type
reflecttype.shortDesc: The user becomes the same type or types as the target.

makeitrain.name: Make It Rain
makeitrain.shortDesc: Lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat by 2 stages.

mortalspin.name: Mortal Spin
mortalspin.shortDesc: Removes the Bound and Leech Seeded statuses from the user and removes the Sticky Web, Stealth Rock, Spikes, and Toxic Spikes statuses from the user’s side. Poisons targets.

headlongrush.name: Headlong Rush
headlongrush.shortDesc: Lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage.

shelter.name: Shelter
shelter.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Defense stat by 2 stages.

worryseed.name: Worry Seed
worryseed.shortDesc: Changes the target’s Ability to Insomnia.

trickortreat.name: Trick-or-Treat
trickortreat.shortDesc: Gives the target the Trick-or-Treating status.

watershuriken.name: Water Shuriken
watershuriken.shortDesc: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.

partingshot.name: Parting Shot
partingshot.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage. The user then switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon.

confide.name: Confide
confide.shortDesc: Lowers the target's Sp. Atk by 1.

spiritbreak.name: Spirit Break
spiritbreak.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.

falsesurrender.name: False Surrender
falsesurrender.shortDesc: This move does not check accuracy.

quash.name: Quash
quash.shortDesc: Causes the target to move last in the turn.

magicpowder.name: Magic Powder
magicpowder.shortDesc: Changes the target’s type to Psychic.

flyingpress.name: Flying Press
flyingpress.shortDesc: The damage dealt by this move is calculated by combining the effectiveness of the move’s own type with that of the Flying type. If the target has the Minimized status, this move’s power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.

electrify.name: Electrify
electrify.shortDesc: If this move hits the target before it uses a move, its move becomes Electric type for that turn.

shedtail.name: Shed Tail
shedtail.shortDesc: The user loses 1/2 of its max HP to create a substitute, then switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon. The substitute will be hit by moves instead of that Pokémon, and it will vanish when it takes damage equal to 1/4 of the user’s max HP.

circlethrow.name: Circle Throw
circlethrow.shortDesc: If there are other Pokémon in the target’s party that can switch into battle, the target is forced to switch out of battle and is replaced by one of those Pokémon at random.

comeuppance.name: Comeuppance
comeuppance.shortDesc: The user retaliates to deal 150% of the damage it took from an opponent’s move during the turn this move is used.

syrupbomb.name: Syrup Bomb
syrupbomb.shortDesc: Gives the target the Syrupy status for 3 turns.

ficklebeam.name: Fickle Beam
ficklebeam.shortDesc: This move has a 30% chance of its power being doubled.

darkestlariat.name: Darkest Lariat
darkestlariat.shortDesc: This move ignores the target’s stat changes when dealing damage.

flamewheel.name: Flame Wheel
flamewheel.shortDesc: 10% chance to burn the target. Thaws user.

guillotine.name: Guillotine
guillotine.shortDesc: Knocks out the target. The accuracy of this move is fixed at 30%.

furycutter.name: Fury Cutter
furycutter.shortDesc: Power doubles with each hit, up to 160.

stoneaxe.name: Stone Axe
stoneaxe.shortDesc: Gives the opponent’s side the Stealth Rock status.

fairylock.name: Fairy Lock
fairylock.shortDesc: Gives all Pokémon on the field the Fairy Locked status.

nobleroar.name: Noble Roar
nobleroar.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage.

clangingscales.name: Clanging Scales
clangingscales.shortDesc: Lowers the user’s Defense stat by 1 stage.

clangoroussoul.name: Clangorous Soul
clangoroussoul.shortDesc: The user loses 1/3 of its max HP to boost its Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats by 1 stage. This move fails if the user doesn’t have enough remaining HP.

teeterdance.name: Teeter Dance
teeterdance.shortDesc: Confuses all other Pokémon on the field.

workup.name: Work Up
workup.shortDesc: Raises the user's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1.

bonerush.name: Bone Rush
bonerush.shortDesc: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.

rocksmash.name: Rock Smash
rocksmash.shortDesc: 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.

finalgambit.name: Final Gambit
finalgambit.shortDesc: The user faints. This move deals damage to the target equal to the user’s remaining HP at the time this move was used.

shockwave.name: Shock Wave
shockwave.shortDesc: This move does not check accuracy.

tailslap.name: Tail Slap
tailslap.shortDesc: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.

acupressure.name: Acupressure
acupressure.shortDesc: Boosts the Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, Speed, accuracy, or evasiveness of the user or an ally by 2 stages.

topsyturvy.name: Topsy-Turvy
topsyturvy.shortDesc: Inverts all stat changes affecting the target.

mist.name: Mist
mist.shortDesc: For 5 turns, protects user's party from stat drops.

echoedvoice.name: Echoed Voice
echoedvoice.shortDesc: Power increases when used on consecutive turns.

populationbomb.name: Population Bomb
populationbomb.shortDesc: The user attacks 1 to 10 times in a row. The attack ends if the user misses.

tidyup.name: Tidy Up
tidyup.shortDesc: Removes the Sticky Web, Stealth Rock, Substitute, Spikes, and Toxic Spikes statuses from the entire field. Boosts the user’s Attack and Speed stats by 1 stage.

poweruppunch.name: Power-Up Punch
poweruppunch.shortDesc: 100% chance to raise the user's Attack by 1.

axekick.name: Axe Kick
axekick.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of confusing the target. If this move misses or fails, the user takes damage equal to 1/2 of its max HP.

flowertrick.name: Flower Trick
flowertrick.shortDesc: This move never misses and is always a critical hit.

aurawheel.name: Aura Wheel
aurawheel.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Speed stat by 1 stage. This move’s type depends on Morpeko’s form.

instruct.name: Instruct
instruct.shortDesc: The user makes the target reuse the last move it used.

barbbarrage.name: Barb Barrage
barbbarrage.shortDesc: Has a 50% chance of poisoning the target. This move’s power is doubled if the target is poisoned or badly poisoned.

volttackle.name: Volt Tackle
volttackle.shortDesc: Has a 10% chance of paralyzing the target. The user also takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.

bind.name: Bind
bind.shortDesc: Gives the target the Bound status.

strengthsap.name: Strength Sap
strengthsap.shortDesc: Restores the user’s HP by an amount equal to the target’s Attack stat. Lowers the target’s Attack stat by 1 stage.

teatime.name: Teatime
teatime.shortDesc: Causes all Pokémon on the field to eat their held Berries.

aquastep.name: Aqua Step
aquastep.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Speed stat by 1 stage.

rockwrecker.name: Rock Wrecker
rockwrecker.shortDesc: The user gains the Recharging status on the turn after this move is used.

razorleaf.name: Razor Leaf
razorleaf.shortDesc: High critical hit ratio. Hits adjacent foes.

firelash.name: Fire Lash
firelash.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Defense stat by 1 stage.

ceaselessedge.name: Ceaseless Edge
ceaselessedge.shortDesc: Gives the opponent’s side the Spikes status.

spicyextract.name: Spicy Extract
spicyextract.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Defense stat by 2 stages and boosts its Attack stat by 2 stages.

brine.name: Brine
brine.shortDesc: Power doubles if the target's HP is 50% or less.

stuffcheeks.name: Stuff Cheeks
stuffcheeks.shortDesc: The user eats its held Berry and boosts its Defense stat by 2 stages. This move can’t be used if the user is not holding a Berry.

matchagotcha.name: Matcha Gotcha
matchagotcha.shortDesc: Has a 20% chance of burning targets. The user’s HP is restored by 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

torchsong.name: Torch Song
torchsong.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.

shellsidearm.name: Shell Side Arm
shellsidearm.shortDesc: Has a 20% chance of poisoning the target. Becomes a physical move if that will deal more damage.

eeriespell.name: Eerie Spell
eeriespell.shortDesc: Removes 3 PP from the move last used by the target.

chillyreception.name: Chilly Reception
chillyreception.shortDesc: Summons snow for 5 turns. The user switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon.

direclaw.name: Dire Claw
direclaw.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of leaving the target poisoned, paralyzed, or asleep.

snaptrap.name: Snap Trap
snaptrap.shortDesc: Gives the target the Bound status.

waterpledge.name: Water Pledge
waterpledge.shortDesc: Use with Grass or Fire Pledge for added effect.

terablast.name: Tera Blast
terablast.shortDesc: If Terastallized: Phys. if Atk > SpA, type = Tera.

ragingbull.name: Raging Bull
ragingbull.shortDesc: Removes the Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil statuses on the target’s side. This move’s type depends on the user’s form.

gigatonhammer.name: Gigaton Hammer
gigatonhammer.shortDesc: This move can’t be used twice in a row.

beakblast.name: Beak Blast
beakblast.shortDesc: If the user is hit by a contact move before it uses this move, the attacker will be burned.

banefulbunker.name: Baneful Bunker
banefulbunker.shortDesc: The user protects itself from incoming moves for the turn. Any attackers that use contact moves against the user during this turn become poisoned. With each consecutive use, this move’s chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.

hornleech.name: Horn Leech
hornleech.shortDesc: The user’s HP is restored by 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

forestscurse.name: Forest’s Curse
forestscurse.shortDesc: Gives the target the Forest Cursed status.

tropkick.name: Trop Kick
tropkick.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Attack stat by 1 stage.

infernalparade.name: Infernal Parade
infernalparade.shortDesc: Has a 30% chance of burning the target. This move’s power is doubled if the target has a status condition.

firepledge.name: Fire Pledge
firepledge.shortDesc: Use with Grass or Water Pledge for added effect.

quiverdance.name: Quiver Dance
quiverdance.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats by 1 stage.

fierydance.name: Fiery Dance
fierydance.shortDesc: Has a 50% chance of boosting the user’s Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.

psyshieldbash.name: Psyshield Bash
psyshieldbash.shortDesc: Boosts the user’s Defense stat by 1 stage.

bittermalice.name: Bitter Malice
bittermalice.shortDesc: Lowers the target’s Attack stat by 1 stage.

nightdaze.name: Night Daze
nightdaze.shortDesc: Has a 40% chance of lowering the target’s accuracy by 1 stage.
